label: Open Positions
description: Open prediction market positions with entry price, current price, P&L, and expiry.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx wrapping all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=['predictions-trading']. 0.3: availableOn=['predictions']. 0.4: no any or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: no lib/mocks/ imports in widget file. 0.6: PredictionsDataContext is synchronous mock — no async fetch, no isLoading field; data is immediately available on mount; no spinner needed (same pattern as DeFi domain). usePredictionsData() throws when provider missing, caught by global WidgetErrorBoundary. 0.7: TableWidget renders emptyMessage='No open positions' when openPositions is empty — LiveFeedWidget shell handles it. 0.8: Context has no error field; usePredictionsData() throw on missing provider is caught by WidgetErrorBoundary (0.1); no additional error UI required. 0.9: no dead code found.

1.1.note: — widget reads openPositions exclusively via usePredictionsData() hook, no inline fetch or import.

1.3.note: — openPositions memo filters by scopeStrategyIds.length when a scope is selected.

1.4.note: — clientIds are destructured via getStrategyIdsForScope; PredictionPosition has no clientId field so full client narrowing deferred to future schema work.

1.5.note: — strategy filter applied; scopeStrategyIds drives the deterministic subset.

1.6.note: — when scopeStrategyIds.length===0 no filtering is applied, all open positions returned.

1.7.note: KNOWN-GAP — MOCK_POSITIONS lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data; moving to lib/constants/ is future scope, not this task.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — widget reads openPositions exclusively via usePredictionsData() hook, no inline fetch or import. 1.2 PASS — PredictionsDataContext calls useGlobalScope() and getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3 PASS — openPositions memo filters by scopeStrategyIds.length when a scope is selected. 1.4 PARTIAL — clientIds are destructured via getStrategyIdsForScope; PredictionPosition has no clientId field so full client narrowing deferred to future schema work. 1.5 PASS — strategy filter applied; scopeStrategyIds drives the deterministic subset. 1.6 PASS — when scopeStrategyIds.length===0 no filtering is applied, all open positions returned. 1.7 KNOWN-GAP — MOCK_POSITIONS lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data; moving to lib/constants/ is future scope, not this task.

knownIssues.description: Client-level filter not wired — PredictionPosition has no clientId field; full client narrowing deferred to schema change.
Reference data (MOCK_POSITIONS) lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/ rather than lib/constants/; moving is future scope.
